titleStmt.title: SII 15.54: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 54. (B.K. No. 158 of 1926-27.) MALLASAMUDRA, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Īśvara temple.

This is dated the year 8, Durmukhi, Pushya [pūrṇimā], Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, the week day being lost. The cyclic year Durmukhi did not occur during the reign of Taila III, to whom the record is ascribable on palaeographic grounds.

It records a gift of land, made into the hands of [Vāma]śakti-paṇḍita, to the god Mūlasthāna. It contains an eulogy of Mallikārjuna-muni. Aṇṇigeṟe and agrahārachūḍāmaṇi Lokkiguṇḍi are mentioned. The inscription is badly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithivīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāsraya kuḷatiḷaka
ḷōkyamalladēva rājyamuttarō
tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
mūnnūṟaṟo
duṣṭa nigrahavisiṣṭa pratipāḷa
8 neya durmmukhi saṁvatsarada puṣya[da nnami]
yaṇa saṁkrāṁnti vyatīpātadaṁdu . svastiyama re
ṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapa samūdhiśīla rapaṇḍi
ta dēvargge pādaprakṣāḷana dhārāpūrvvaṁ māḍi
ḷiya mūlasthānadēvargge Aṁgabhōga dhūpadīpa nivēdyakkeṁdu kōlo
ḷu biṭṭa mattareraḍu Alliya tapōdhana
ḍu Aṁtu Aṁṇnigeṟeya kōloḷu biṭṭa mattarnnālku
ḍe bikkāligana keyyiṁ paḍuvalu nelliya gēriyiṁ roḍeya sō
manātha dēvara bhūmiyiṁ mūḍalu kuṟutakōṭe hōda ba
ṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalu Aṁtu mattaru nālukumaṁ koṭṭaru . dharmmamahi
māspadamāda mahāgrahāracūḍāmaṇi lokkiguṁḍi yaṟi
daivamenalu �nākāra vaṁdyadēva maṭhapā mahā
dēva nāmāvaraśiṣya śrī mallikārjunadēvara prabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . tanā
caritradoḷupa nudhya dharmmanirmāṇadoḷu maṁ śrī vibhurā
da padadoḷu tāḷduttamirddaṁte yaśōdhanamītaṁ kritakrityana negaḷu
tirddappudī viśvamēdinī yīśanaṁ muni mallikārjunanaṁ śaivāgamā
ryyanaṁ . mattaṁ mēruvinuṁnnatikegeḍeyāgi saduṁnnati kalpavri
kṣama pārisadi payōdhiyene gaṁbhīra
taṁnnoḷoppire peṟarddoreyārenuttirppaṁdāgaḷuṁ dhāriṇi mallikārjuna munīśvara
naṁ budhakalpavrikṣanaṁ . [mūḍu gi] baṁdu battada payōnidhiyuḷḷaḍe
Antu kaige vaṁdadakkaḷa baṭṭalaṁterada maṁdaramuḷḷaḍe bēḍada gaṁtadadhīradi varkkalpa kuja
muḷḷaḍe mallikārjjunanoḷaṁtavellavaṁ paḍiyiḍe dōṣamallada bīrate
yuṁnnatiyo[ppe gaḷge]yoḷu . Antu negaḷtevetta mallikārjjuna munīśvarana guṇapra
bhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . satyatyāga guṇaṁgaḷiṁnārjjisidūrjjitakīrtticaṁdrike
yiṁ sakala digbhittigaḷaṁ sudhādhavaḷitaṁ māḍi negaḷtevetta kīrtti caṁ
jaṁbūdvīpamaṁ śvētadvīpamaṁ māḍida mallikārjjuna munīśvaraṁ
pa vara parōkṣakkeṁdu taṁmma
nadēvara yaṁga bhōgakkeṁdu vāmaśaktipaṁḍitadēvargge dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ Aṟuveṇa
koṭṭa mattaroṁdu Adama meyeṁteṁdaḍe gaddeya kaṭṭi
tōṭadiṁ teṁkalu dēvara hūdōṭada bāviyiṁ teṁkalu
Aṁ gaḷu gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ tō nellāruṁ mūlastāna
vireleya biṭṭa dharmma . Alliya telligaru Aruva tokkalugaḷu
sarvvanama
vīsavaṁ biṭṭa nī dharmmamaṁ
varu . Intīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi
damaged
Digital edition of SII 15.54 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
